**Hendricks Holding, Inc.** (HHC) is a privately held conglomerate based in Beloit, Wisconsin , United States.

## History and management

 [edit ]

The company was founded in 1982 by Ken Hendricks and Diane Hendricks , owners of ABC Supply .

By the time of his death on December 21, 2007, Ken Hendricks was the 107th richest person in America according to Forbes October 2006 issue. <sup>[[ 1 ]]()</sup>

## Operations and holdings

 [edit ]

The Hendrick Holding now includes numerous enterprises that span the fields of industry, transportation and logistics, insurance, real estate and construction, recycling, restaurants, and the film industry. <sup>[[ 2 ]]()</sup>
